title: Iran says it is selling oil at 20% premium as end of U.S. blockade sees 40 million barrels exported
summary_full: The ceasefire prompted a surge in crude shipments through the Strait of Hormuz, where traffic had largely ground to a halt during the conflict.
summary_public: The ceasefire prompted a surge in crude shipments through the Strait of Hormuz, where traffic had largely ground to a halt during the conflict.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran says it is selling oil at 20% premium
